title.es: API y Navegación de JSON Complejo

description.us: Practice RESTful API interactions with POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, and follow-up GET requests using JavaScript.
description.es: Practica interacciones RESTful con APIs usando POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE y consultas posteriores con GET en JavaScript.
